modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Link in the Portal directs to a blank page before loading correctly.

full_description_text: A field technician reported an issue with a link in the My USD Portal. Upon clicking the link, it initially leads to a blank page, requiring a second click to reach the intended destination. This behavior disrupts the user experience and may hinder efficient navigation within the portal.
short_description: Link in the Portal directs to a blank page before loading correctly.
description: A field technician reported an issue with a link in the My USD Portal.
